calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Settlement on the record.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Brock Phillips, Esq., for Plaintiff: Dyan Dreisbach.
Thomas Best., Esq., for Defendant: Diana E. Pettinicchi, also present.
At 9:15 a.m., In open court, terms of settlement were put on the record.
A settlement was put on the record relating to premises located at 169 Grand View Ave., San Francisco, CA.
Terms of the settlement are as follows: Stipulation for entry of Judgment or Dismissal.
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against defendant, or dismissal with prejudice within three days after defendant vacated.
Defendant to vacate the premises on or before May 31, 2004.
Payment of $2,500.00 by Cashier's check to plaintiff in open court.
F/F of last month rent and security deposit.
Each to bear own costs and fees.
All agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled and trial date vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brock David Philllips, Esq. for Plaintiff
Dyan Dreisbach & Lucy Stevenson, Plaintiffs
Thomas G. Best, Esq., for Defendant
Diana E. Pettinicchi, Defendant

Settlement Conference held. Case did not settle. Jury Trial remains.
Parties waive court reporter.

JPT: Michelle Brant (303A) Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, No reporter

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Matthew Lawrinets, Esq., Law Offices of Thomas G. Best (915) 956-7654 for Defendant and Moving Party Pettinicchi
Patricia Doran Suddendorf, Esq., Pacific West Law Group (415) 381-0805, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Dreisbach
RULING:
THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING as to DEFENDANT DIANA E. PETTINICCHI DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED; 5 days leave to answer. HEARING HELD re: Request For Sanctions: GRANTED. The Law Offices of Thomas G. Best shall pay the sum of $500.00 to Attorney Suddendorf on or before the date the answer is filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (JLW/301/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
